top_signals.title: SpaceX Readies Its $20 Billion Bond Debut to Fund AI Ambition
top_signals.summary: SpaceX is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time in what’s expected to be the start of a massive borrowing spree to fund the company’s AI ambitions following its record $75 billion IPO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
